Class LazyCompoundTag

java.lang.Object
com.sk89q.jnbt.Tag<Object, org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag>
com.sk89q.jnbt.CompoundTag
com.sk89q.jnbt.LazyCompoundTag
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.enginehub.linbus.tree.ToLinTag<org.enginehub.linbus.tree.LinCompoundTag>
@Deprecated public abstract class LazyCompoundTag extends CompoundTag
Deprecated.
Use LinCompoundTag.
Allows detection of the version-specific LazyCompoundTag classes.
